query: Create a price oracle app that fetches ETH prices from multiple sources
expected_behavior: Reads the current project structure before making changes
Adds reqwest dependency to workspace Cargo.toml and binary Cargo.toml
Creates a GET /price/{asset} route handler
Implements fetching from multiple price sources
Uses proper error handling (no unwrap/expect in production code)
Computes median or aggregated price
Returns JSON with asset, price, source count, and timestamp
Designs the endpoint as stateless (no in-memory storage of prices)

query: Deploy this app to TVC autonomously
expected_behavior: Runs tests and lint first
Builds the OCI container with make
Pushes to a container registry
Verifies the image is publicly pullable before deploying
Computes the binary digest (not container digest)
Uses --json flag to parse tvc CLI output with jq
Creates app with tvc --json app create
Creates deployment with tvc --json deploy create
Approves with --yes and --no-input flags (no interactive prompts)
Checks deployment status
Constructs the app URL from the App ID

query: My TVC deployment shows Live but all endpoints return 404
expected_behavior: Checks if the container image is publicly accessible
Verifies the correct app URL domain for the environment
Checks the api_base_url in tvc.config.toml to determine the right domain
Suggests making the ghcr.io package public or using a pull secret
Provides the command to verify image accessibility

query: Build a timestamp notary service with shared state
expected_behavior: Reads the current project structure before making changes
Creates POST /notarize, GET /verify/{receipt_id}, GET /stats endpoints
Uses Arc<RwLock<...>> for shared state management
Warns about multi-instance state inconsistency in TVC
Explains that each enclave instance has independent memory
Recommends stateless design as alternative
Writes unit tests using Tower oneshot
Writes e2e tests using the Builder harness
Runs make -C src test and make -C src lint to verify

query: Set up CI/CD for deploying to TVC
expected_behavior: Shows how to use TVC_* environment variables to bypass login
Uses --json, --no-input, and --yes flags for full automation
Parses app_id and operator_id from JSON output with jq
Includes the full pipeline: build, push, deploy create, deploy approve
Mentions the --pivot-pull-secret option for private images

query: How do I deploy my app to TVC?
expected_behavior: Explains both Dashboard and CLI deployment paths
Shows the autonomous CLI workflow with --json and --yes flags
Describes the deployment fields (container URL, executable path, args, ports, digest)
Distinguishes between binary digest and container image digest
Explains the approval step and how to skip interactive prompts
Mentions the app URL format (app-<UUID>.turnkey.cloud)
Warns about private container images on ghcr.io
